title: Resident Engineer (Infrastructure)
description:
Job Description


Managing a team of technical supervisors on site to ensure that all works comply fully with regulatory and client's requirements

  • Work closely with Professional Engineers, regulatory authorities and contractors to provide planning, design and supervision leadership not only to solve site problems, but also to ensure timely completion of the projects
  • Responsible for implementing and sustaining the site supervision quality & safety assurance system
  • Carry out supervision of structural & geotechnical works by identifying any non-conformity of contractor's works on site
  • Understand drawings & contract documents in carrying out the works
  • Implement the site supervision quality and safety assurance system
  • To carry out regular site checks on contractor & ensure compliance with health and work safety in accordance with MOM regulation
  • Attend site progress and technical meetings with the project team and Client to resolve site and technical issues
  • Ensure that proper site documentation for ongoing works, site meetings, safety records, method statements, shop drawings, as built submissions etc., are well managed

Requirements

  • Degree in C&S Engineering from a University accredited by the Professional Engineers Board, Singapore
  • Must be accredited as a Resident Engineer with BCA/IES/ACES
  • Min. 5 to 8 years’ site working experience in Singapore for civil engineering, pavement & ground improvement project working experience would be advantage point
  • Working experience in road, drain, earthwork, retaining wall, building and airfield construction would be preferable
  • Strong knowledge of C&S details, working drawings, shop drawings and C&S construction method
  • Strong knowledge of LTA, PUB, NParks and BCA requirements and regulation for construction.
  • Good supervisory and leadership skills
  • Excellent communication skills, mathematical acumen, time management aptitude and the ability to solve complex problems

postedCompany.description:
We deliver total urban, infrastructure and engineering solutions to support social and economic growth.

As Asia’s consultancy powerhouse for urbanization, industrial and infrastructure developments, we have a distinguished track record in shaping Singapore’s landscape over the last 50 years.

Surbana Jurong Private Limited (SJ) provides one-stop consultancy solutions across the entire value chain of urbanisation, industrialisation and infrastructure domains.

The company offers architecture, engineering, project and construction management, urban planning, infrastructure and SMART City services. Headquartered in Singapore, SJ has a global workforce of 13,000 employees in over 95 offices across 40 countries in Asia, Australia, the Middle East, Africa and the Americas.
postedCompany.name: SURBANA JURONG CONSULTANTS PTE. LTD.
